TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Seediq, story: sdqNr-rain_pawan 2020s
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: mlawa quyux nii na asi ka ml a seediq tnalang uciicin ka musa smkagun kesaun plawa quyux nii.
S.PHON: mlawa qujux nii na asi ka ml a seediq tnalaŋ uʦiiʦin ka musa smkagun kesaun plawa qujux nii.
S.FORM: mlawa quyux nii na asi ka ml a seediq tnalang uciicin ka musa smkagun kesaun plawa quyux nii.
S.PHON: mlawa qujux nii na asi ka ml a seediq tnalaŋ uʦiiʦin ka musa smkagun kesaun plawa qujux nii.
S.TRANSL: 有關求雨的這個儀式呢,一定要其他的部落的人去請求祈雨祭司.
As for the ritual to pray for rain, it is neccesary to ask people in other tribes to request the shaman who prays for rain.

S.FORM: ma bobona hanta cim ma qqeya haducunta.
S.PHON: ma bobona ħanta ʦim ma qqeja ħaduʦunta.
S.FORM: ma bobona hanta cim ma qqeya haducunta.
S.PHON: ma bobona ħanta ʦim ma qqeja ħaduʦunta.
S.TRANSL: 請他去求雨之後,我們要送工具過去.
After asking him to pray for rain, we give him the instruments.

S.FORM: musa lmawa quyux we saadista kingan rodux.
S.PHON: musa lmawa qujux we saadista kiŋan ɾodux.
S.FORM: musa lmawa quyux we saadista kingan rodux.
S.PHON: musa lmawa qujux we saadista kiŋan ɾodux.
S.TRANSL: 去求雨的時候,我們要帶一隻雞.
We should bring a chicken when we pray for rain.

S.FORM: ini mhemuci rmengo ka rodux kiya.
S.PHON: ini mħemuʦi ɾmeŋo ka ɾodux kija.
S.FORM: ini mhemuci rmengo ka rodux kiya.
S.PHON: ini mħemuʦi ɾmeŋo ka ɾodux kija.
S.TRANSL: 不能對那隻雞亂講話.

TRANSL.notes: (We) cannot say make frivolous remarks to the chicken.

S.TRANSL: cannot say make frivolous remarks to the chicken.

S.FORM: ini kesa hawan bale.
S.PHON: ini kesa ħawan bale.
S.FORM: ini kesa hawan bale.
S.PHON: ini kesa ħawan bale.
S.TRANSL: 不能說「真可惜.」
cannot say "It is a pity".

S.FORM: sbegeta narahta sdahun utux ka kiya sa.
S.PHON: sbegeta naɾaħta sdaħun utux ka kija sa.
S.FORM: sbegeta narahta sdahun utux ka kiya sa.
S.PHON: sbegeta naɾaħta sdaħun utux ka kija sa.
S.TRANSL: 聽說,我們給祂,就像我們是為了感謝神靈,才將雞隻獻給神靈,老人家是這樣說的.
As people say, we give the chicken to the spirits because we want to express gratitude to them.

S.FORM: ma kika wada mqaras mangan ka seediq skagulan musa a.
S.PHON: ma kika wada mqaɾas maŋan ka seediq skagulan musa a.
S.FORM: ma kika wada mqaras mangan ka seediq skagulan musa a.
S.PHON: ma kika wada mqaɾas maŋan ka seediq skagulan musa a.

TRANSL.notes: 被請求(祈雨)的人接受了雞,然後很高興.

S.TRANSL: 被請求 的人接受了雞,然後很高興.
The person asked takes the chicken, and he is very happy.

S.FORM: mlawa quyux wada yayung ma.
S.PHON: mlawa qujux wada jajuŋ ma.
S.FORM: mlawa quyux wada yayung ma.
S.PHON: mlawa qujux wada jajuŋ ma.
S.TRANSL: 他們往河流那邊走去祈雨.
They walked toward the river to pray for rain.

S.FORM: musa treeru yayung musa nangi qluli.
S.PHON: musa tɾeeɾu jajuŋ musa naŋi qluli.
S.FORM: musa treeru yayung musa nangi qluli.
S.PHON: musa tɾeeɾu jajuŋ musa naŋi qluli.
S.TRANSL: 走到河中去浸水.

TRANSL.notes: (The shaman) walked into the river and pretended to drift with the tide.

S.TRANSL: walked into the river and pretended to drift with the tide.

S.FORM: kika plp plepingandaha ka rodux kiya wa.
S.PHON: kika plp plepiŋandaħa ka ɾodux kija wa.
S.FORM: kika plp plepingandaha ka rodux kiya wa.
S.PHON: kika plp plepiŋandaħa ka ɾodux kija wa.
S.TRANSL: 他們會將雞打扮得很漂亮.
They would adorn the chicken.

S.FORM: qluliundaha yayung stheyaqdaha kana sdsudu ka rodux kiya kana ko.
S.PHON: qluliundaħa jajuŋ stħejaqdaħa kana sdsudu ka ɾodux kija kana ko.
S.FORM: qluliundaha yayung stheyaqdaha kana sdsudu ka rodux kiya kana ko.
S.PHON: qluliundaħa jajuŋ stħejaqdaħa kana sdsudu ka ɾodux kija kana ko.
S.TRANSL: 他們把雞放到溪流,也放花草樹木跟著牠一起漂.
They put in the river the chicken, grass, and flowers, and let them float on the water.

S.FORM: mangan ruting ma mhedu kiya do kiya meyah sapah di.
S.PHON: maŋan ɾutiŋ ma mħedu kija do kija mejaħ sapaħ di.
S.FORM: mangan ruting ma mhedu kiya do kiya meyah sapah di.
S.PHON: maŋan ɾutiŋ ma mħedu kija do kija mejaħ sapaħ di.
S.TRANSL: 完成以上程序,那麼就回家了.
After the ritual is done, they go home.

S.FORM: bale ba kiya nii sa m kesaun mlawa quyux nii do.
S.PHON: bale ba kija nii sa m kesaun mlawa qujux nii do.
S.FORM: bale ba kiya nii sa m kesaun mlawa quyux nii do.
S.PHON: bale ba kija nii sa m kesaun mlawa qujux nii do.
S.TRANSL: 據說這件事情是真的有效.
It is said this ritual is effective.

S.FORM: ini ba qberiq.
S.PHON: ini ba qbeɾiq.
S.FORM: ini ba qberiq.
S.PHON: ini ba qbeɾiq.
S.TRANSL: 所謂這個求雨的儀式呢,不是假的.
The so-called ritual to pray for rain really works.

S.FORM: a mhedu dehuk a ya musa yayung deheya do asi quyux duma.
S.PHON: a mħedu deħuk a ja musa jajuŋ deħeja do asi qujux duma.
S.FORM: a mhedu dehuk a ya musa yayung deheya do asi quyux duma.
S.PHON: a mħedu deħuk a ja musa jajuŋ deħeja do asi qujux duma.
S.TRANSL: 他們到達河流處,有時候,馬上就下雨了.
Sometimes just as they reached the river, the rain fell down.

S.FORM: ma kiya ka mqaras ka seediq ka.
S.PHON: ma kija ka mqaɾas ka seediq ka.
S.FORM: ma kiya ka mqaras ka seediq ka.
S.PHON: ma kija ka mqaɾas ka seediq ka.
S.TRANSL: 那麼,我們的族人就會非常高興.
Then, our tribe would be very happy.

S.FORM: tnalang mosa um mnosa a sm a smkagun.
S.PHON: tnalaŋ mosa um mnosa a sm a smkagun.
S.FORM: tnalang mosa um mnosa a sm a smkagun.
S.PHON: tnalaŋ mosa um mnosa a sm a smkagun.
S.TRANSL: 部落族人去拜託求雨祭司去祈雨.
The tribe ask the shaman to pray for rain.

S.FORM: a kiya naq di ha.
S.PHON: a kija naq di ħa.
S.FORM: a kiya naq di ha.
S.PHON: a kija naq di ħa.
S.TRANSL: 大概就是這樣子了.
That's all.
